final:
// // This module decrements its value on each positive clock edge when the enable signal is LOW.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [n-1:0] count
);parameter n = 4; // Change to desired number of bits

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module decrements its value on each positive clock edge when the enable signal is LOW.
